metadata.title: Hollow Machine
metadata.description: Brooding minimal techno in A minor. Slow 8-bar modal progression (Am–F–G) over a driving 4-on-floor kick with no backbeat, acid bass offbeat pump, syncopated stab hits delayed into dub-techno territory, and warm pad drone. Build → Main A → Break → Main B → Outro. The break drops the kick for a dub-influenced atmospheric passage before the peak return.
